subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Cite several pieces of textual evidence to support analysis of what the text says explicitly as well as inferences, conclusions, and/or generalizations drawn from the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine a theme or central idea of a text and analyze its development over the course of the text; provide an objective summary of the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Analyze how particular elements of a story, drama, or poem interact (e.g., how the setting shapes the characters or plot).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in literature.
eligibleContentText: Analyze how an author develops and contrasts the points of view of different characters or narrators in a text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in literature.
eligibleContentText: Analyze how a drama's or poem's form or structure (e.g., soliloquy, sonnet) contributes to its meaning.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine how the author uses the meaning of words or phrases, including figurative and connotative meanings, in a text; analyze the impact of rhymes and other repetitions of sounds (e.g., alliteration) on a specific verse or stanza of a poem or section of a story or drama.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among texts.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast a fictional portrayal of a time, place, or character and a historical account of the same period as a means of understanding how authors of fiction use or alter history.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 7 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies (context clues; common Greek or Latin affixes and roots).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Demonstrate understanding of figurative language, word relationships, and nuances in word meanings (figures of speech such as literary and mythological allusions; word relationships such as synonym/antonym and analogy; connotations vs. denotations).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 7 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.

anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.

anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in informational texts.
